title: Employee Conduct Policy
content: Employees are expected to maintain professional conduct at all times. Harassment or discrimination of any kind is strictly prohibited and may result in immediate termination.

title: Flexible Work Arrangement
content: Employees can request flexible start and end times with manager approval. Core hours are 10 AM to 3 PM local time.

title: Maternity and Paternity Leave
content: The company offers 16 weeks of fully paid leave for birth parents and 8 weeks for non-birth parents. Additional unpaid leave can be negotiated.

title: Grievance Redressal Mechanism
content: Formal grievances should be submitted in writing to the HR Business Partner. Investigations will be concluded within 15 business days.

title: Performance Improvement Plan (PIP)
content: Employees not meeting expectations may be placed on a 30, 60, or 90-day PIP. Failure to improve will lead to separation.

title: Bereavement Leave
content: Employees are eligible for 5 days of paid leave for the loss of an immediate family member and 1 day for extended family.

title: Referral Bonus Program
content: Successful referrals for Engineering roles result in a $3000 bonus, paid after the new hire completes 90 days of service.

title: Anti-Bribery and Corruption
content: The company maintains a zero-tolerance policy towards bribery. Gifts exceeding $50 must be reported to the Compliance Officer.

title: Workplace Safety and Ergonomics
content: Annual ergonomic assessments are available for all desk-based employees. Report any workplace hazards to the Facilities team immediately.

title: Drug and Alcohol Policy
content: Consumption of alcohol or illegal drugs during working hours is strictly prohibited, except for company-sanctioned events.

title: Whistleblower Protection
content: Employees reporting unethical behavior are protected from retaliation. Reports can be made anonymously through the ethics hotline.

title: Relocation Assistance
content: New hires moving more than 100 miles are eligible for a relocation package covering moving costs and one month of temporary housing.

title: Sabbatical Policy
content: After 5 years of continuous service, employees can take a 4-week paid sabbatical to recharge and pursue personal interests.

title: Dress Code Guidelines
content: The company follows a business-casual dress code. Professional attire is required for high-stakes client meetings.

title: Outside Employment Policy
content: Full-time employees must obtain written permission before taking secondary employment to ensure no conflicts of interest or time.

title: Internal Transfer Policy
content: Employees must spend at least 12 months in their current role before applying for an internal transfer to another department.

title: Jury Duty Leave
content: The company provides full pay for the duration of jury duty service. Employees must provide a copy of the jury summons.

title: Military Leave
content: Employees in the reserves or national guard are granted leave for training and active duty, with differential pay for up to 2 weeks.

title: Commuter Benefits
content: Pre-tax dollars can be allocated for public transit and parking expenses, up to the federal monthly limit.

title: Employee Assistance Program (EAP)
content: Confidential counseling services are available 24/7 for employees and their families to handle stress, financial issues, or legal concerns.

title: Promotion and Salary Review
content: Performance reviews and salary adjustments occur annually in Q1. Promotions are based on business needs and individual impact.

title: Social Media Policy
content: Employees must not disclose confidential company information on social media. Personal posts should state that views are their own.

title: Childcare Support
content: The company partners with local childcare centers to provide discounted rates for employees' children.

title: Adoption Assistance
content: Reimbursement for adoption-related expenses is available up to $5000 per child, including legal fees and travel.

title: Tuition Reimbursement
content: Graduate-level courses in relevant fields may be reimbursed up to $5250 per year, subject to grade 'B' or higher.
